Pound.description: Pounds the foe with forelegs or tail.

Karate Chop.description: A chopping attack with a high critical-hit ratio.

Double Slap.description: Repeatedly slaps the foe 2 to 5 times.

Comet Punch.description: Repeatedly punches the foe 2 to 5 times.

Mega Punch.description: A strong punch thrown with incredible power.

Fire Punch.description: A fiery punch that may burn the foe.

Ice Punch.description: An icy punch that may freeze the foe.

Thunder Punch.description: An electrified punch that may paralyze the foe.

Scratch.description: Scratches the foe with sharp claws.

Vise Grip.description: Grips the foe with large and powerful pincers.

Guillotine.description: A powerful pincer attack that may cause fainting.

Razor Wind.description: A move that strikes the foe.

Swords Dance.description: A fighting dance that sharply raises Attack.

Cut.description: Cuts the foe with sharp scythes, claws, etc.

Gust.description: Strikes the foe with a gust of wind whipped up by wings.

Wing Attack.description: Strikes the foe with wings spread wide.

Whirlwind.description: Blows away the foe with wind and ends the battle.

Fly.description: Flies up on the first turn, then strikes the next turn.

Bind.description: Binds and squeezes the foe for BINDING_TURNS turns.

Slam.description: Slams the foe with a long tail, vine, etc.

Vine Whip.description: Strikes the foe with slender, whiplike vines.

Stomp.description: Stomps the enemy with a big foot. May cause flinching.

Double Kick.description: A double-kicking attack that strikes the foe twice.

Mega Kick.description: An extremely powerful kick with intense force.

Jump Kick.description: A strong jumping kick. May miss and hurt the kicker.

Rolling Kick.description: A fast kick delivered from a rapid spin.

Sand Attack.description: Reduces the foe's accuracy by hurling sand in its face.

Headbutt.description: A ramming attack that may cause flinching.

Horn Attack.description: Jabs the foe with sharp horns.

Fury Attack.description: Jabs the foe 2 to 5 times with sharp horns, etc.

Horn Drill.description: A one-hit KO attack that uses a horn like a drill.

Tackle.description: Charges the foe with a full-body tackle.

Body Slam.description: A full-body slam that may cause paralysis.

Wrap.description: Wraps and squeezes the foe BINDING_TURNS times with vines, etc.

Take Down.description: A reckless charge attack that also hurts the user.

Thrash.description: A rampage of 2 to 3 turns that confuses the user.

Double Edge.description: A life-risking tackle that also hurts the user.

Tail Whip.description: Wags the tail to lower the foe's Defense.

Poison Sting.description: A toxic attack with barbs, etc., that may poison.

Twineedle.description: Stingers on the forelegs jab the foe twice.

Leer.description: Frightens the foe with a leer to lower Defense.

Bite.description: Bites with vicious fangs. May cause flinching.

Roar.description: Makes the foe flee to end the battle.

Sing.description: A soothing song lulls the foe into a deep slumber.

Supersonic.description: Emits bizarre sound waves that confuses the foe.

Sonic Boom.description: Launches shock waves that always inflict 20 HP damage.

Disable.description: Psychically disables one of the foe's moves.

Acid.description: Sprays a hide-melting acid. May lower Sp. Def.

Ember.description: A weak fire attack that may inflict a burn.

Flamethrower.description: A powerful fire attack that may inflict a burn.

Mist.description: Creates a mist that stops reduction of abilities.

Water Gun.description: Squirts water to attack the foe.

Hydro Pump.description: Blasts water at high power to strike the foe.

Surf.description: Creates a huge wave, then crashes it down on the foe.

Ice Beam.description: Blasts the foe with an icy beam that may freeze it.

Blizzard.description: Hits the foe with an icy storm that may freeze it.

Psybeam.description: Fires a peculiar ray that may confuse the foe.

Bubble Beam.description: Forcefully sprays bubbles that may lower Speed.

Aurora Beam.description: Fires a rainbow-colored beam that may lower Attack.

Peck.description: Attacks the foe with a jabbing beak, etc.

Drill Peck.description: A corkscrewing attack with the beak acting as a drill.

Submission.description: A reckless body slam that also hurts the user.

Low Kick.description: A kick that inflicts more damage on heavier foes.

Counter.description: Retaliates any physical hit with double the power.

Seismic Toss.description: Inflicts damage identical to the user's level.

Strength.description: Builds enormous power, then slams the foe.

Absorb.description: An attack that absorbs half the damage inflicted.

Leech Seed.description: Plants a seed on the foe to steal HP on every turn.

Growth.description: Forces the body to grow, raising Attack and Sp. Atk.

Razor Leaf.description: Cuts the enemy with leaves. High critical-hit ratio.

Solar Beam.description: Absorbs light in one turn, then attacks next turn.

Poison Powder.description: Scatters a toxic powder that may poison the foe.

Stun Spore.description: Scatters a powder that may paralyze the foe.

Petal Dance.description: A rampage of 2 to 3 turns that confuses the user.

String Shot.description: Binds the foe with string to reduce its Speed.

Dragon Rage.description: Launches shock waves that always inflict 40 HP damage.

Fire Spin.description: Traps the foe in a ring of fire for BINDING_TURNS turns.

Rock Throw.description: Throws small rocks to strike the foe.

Toxic.description: Poisons the foe with an intensifying toxin.

Confusion.description: A psychic attack that may cause confusion.

Psychic.description: A powerful psychic attack that may lower Sp. Def.

Hypnosis.description: A hypnotizing move that may induce sleep.

Meditate.description: Meditates in a peaceful fashion to raise Attack.

Agility.description: Relaxes the body to sharply boost Speed.

Quick Attack.description: An extremely fast attack that always strikes first.

Rage.description: Raises the user's Attack every time it is hit.

Teleport.description: A psychic move for fleeing from battle instantly.

Night Shade.description: Inflicts damage identical to the user's level.

Mimic.description: Copies a move used by the foe during one battle.

Screech.description: Emits a screech to sharply reduce the foe's Defense.

Double Team.description: Creates illusory copies to raise evasiveness.

Recover.description: Recovers up to half the user's maximum HP.

Harden.description: Stiffens the body's  muscles to raise Defense.

Light Screen.description: Creates a wall of light that lowers Sp. Atk damage.

Haze.description: Creates a black haze that eliminates all stat changes.

Focus Energy.description: Focuses power to raise the critical-hit ratio.

Bide.description: Endures attack for 2 turns to retaliate double.

Metronome.description: Waggles a finger to use any PokÃ©mon move at random.

Egg Bomb.description: An egg is forcibly hurled at the foe.

Lick.description: Licks with a long tongue to injure. May also paralyze.

Smog.description: An exhaust-gas attack that may also poison.

Sludge.description: Sludge is hurled to inflict damage. May also poison.

Bone Club.description: Clubs the foe with a bone. May cause flinching.

Waterfall.description: Charges the foe with speed to climb waterfalls.

Clamp.description: Traps and squeezes the foe for BINDING_TURNS turns.

Skull Bash.description: Tucks in the head, then attacks on the next turn.

Spike Cannon.description: Launches sharp spikes that strike 2 to 5 times.

Constrict.description: Constricts to inflict pain. May lower Speed.

Amnesia.description: Forgets about something and sharply raises Sp. Def.

Kinesis.description: Distracts the foe. May lower accuracy.

Soft Boiled.description: Recovers up to half the user's maximum HP.

Glare.description: Intimidates and frightens the foe into paralysis.

Dream Eater.description: Takes one half the damage inflicted on a sleeping foe.

Poison Gas.description: Envelops the foe in a toxic gas that poisons.

Lovely Kiss.description: Demands a kiss with a scary face that induces sleep.

Sky Attack.description: Searches out weak spots, then strikes the next turn.

Bubble.description: An attack using bubbles. May lower the foe's Speed.

Spore.description: Scatters a cloud of spores that always induce sleep.

Flash.description: Looses a powerful blast of light that cuts accuracy.

Psywave.description: Attacks with a psychic wave of varying intensity.

Splash.description: It's just a splash... Has no effect whatsoever.

Acid Armor.description: Liquifies the user's body to sharply raise Defense.

Crabhammer.description: Hammers with a pincer. Has a high critical-hit ratio.

Explosion.description: Inflicts severe damage but makes the user faint.

Fury Swipes.description: Rakes the foe with sharp claws, etc., 2 to 5 times.

Rest.description: The user sleeps for 2 turns, restoring HP and status.

Rock Slide.description: Large boulders are hurled. May cause flinching.

Slash.description: Slashes with claws, etc. Has a high critical-hit ratio.

Flail.description: Inflicts more damage when the user's HP is down.

Detect.description: Evades attack, but may fail if used in succession.

Bone Rush.description: Strikes the foe with a bone in hand 2 to 5 times.

Present.description: A gift in the form of a bomb. May restore HP.

Dragon Breath.description: Strikes the foe with an incredible blast of breath.

Sweet Scent.description: Allures the foe to reduce evasiveness.

Iron Tail.description: Attacks with a rock-hard tail. May lower Defense.

Vital Throw.description: Makes the user's move last, but it never misses.

Morning Sun.description: Restores HP. The amount varies with the weather.

Synthesis.description: Restores HP. The amount varies with the weather.

Moonlight.description: Restores HP. The amount varies with the weather.

Hidden Power.description: The effectiveness varies with the user.

Cross Chop.description: A double-chopping attack. High critical-hit ratio.

Twister.description: Whips up a vicious twister to tear at the foe.

Rain Dance.description: Boosts the power of Water- type moves for 5 turns.

Crunch.description: Crunches with sharp fangs. May lower Defense.

Charge.description: Charges power to boost the electric move used next.

additionalEffects.effect: Paralyze, Drop Accuracy 1 Stage, Flinch, Confuse, Poison, Sleep, Drop Speed 1 Stage, Drop Attack 1 Stage, or Drop Defense 1 Stage Depending on the Environment

Draco Meteor.description: Casts comets onto the foe. Harshly lowers the Sp. Atk.

Magnet Bomb.description: Launches a magnet that strikes without fail.

Captivate.description: Makes the opposite gender sharply reduce its Sp. Atk.

Grass Knot.description: A snare attack that does more damage to heavier foes.

Chatter.description: Attacks with a sound wave that causes confusion.

Judgment.description: The type varies with the kind of Plate held.

Charge Beam.description: Fires a beam of electricity. May raise Sp. Atk.

Wide Guard.description: Evades wide-ranging attacks for one turn.

Power Split.description: Averages changes to Attack and Sp. Atk with the foe.

Autotomize.description: Sheds additional weight to sharply boost Speed.

Rage Powder.description: Scatters powder to make foes attack only the user.

Telekinesis.description: Makes the foe float. It is easier to hit for 3 turns.

Quiver Dance.description: Dances to raise Sp. Atk Sp. Def and Speed.

Soak.description: Sprays water at the foe making it Water-type.

Coil.description: Coils up to raise Attack, Defense and Accuracy.

Low Sweep.description: Attacks the foe's legs lowering its Speed.

Acid Spray.description: Sprays a hide-melting acid. Sharply reduces Sp. Def.

Foul Play.description: The higher the foe's Attack the more damage caused.

Simple Beam.description: A beam that changes the foe's ability to Simple.

Entrainment.description: Makes the foe mimic the user, gaining its ability.

Round.description: A song that inflicts damage. Others can join in too.

Echoed Voice.description: Does more damage every turn it is used.

Clear Smog.description: Attacks with white haze that eliminates all stat changes.

Stored Power.description: The higher the user's stats the more damage caused.

Quick Guard.description: Evades priority attacks for one turn.

Ally Switch.description: The user switches places with its partner.

Scald.description: Shoots boiling water at the foe. May inflict a burn.

Shell Smash.description: Raises offensive stats, but lowers defensive stats.

Heal Pulse.description: Recovers up to half the target's maximum HP.

Hex.description: Does double damage if the foe has a status problem.

Incinerate.description: Burns up Berries and Gems preventing their use.

Quash.description: Suppresses the foe, making it move last.

Inferno.description: Powerful and sure to inflict a burn, but inaccurate.

Techno Blast.description: The type varies with the kind of Drive held.

Snarl.description: Yells and rants at the foe lowering its Sp. Atk.

V Create.description: Very powerful, but lowers Defense, Sp. Def and Speed.

Fusion Flare.description: Summons a fireball. Works well with a thunderbolt.

Mat Block.description: Evades damaging moves for one turn.

Belch.description: Lets out a loud belch. Must eat a Berry to use it.

Rototiller.description: Ups the Attack and Sp. Atk of Grass-type PokÃ©mon.

Sticky Web.description: Weaves a sticky net that slows foes switching in.

Crafty Shield.description: Evades status moves for one turn.

Kings Shield.description: Evades damage, and sharply reduces Attack if struck.

Play Nice.description: Befriend the foe, lowering its Attack without fail.

Confide.description: Shares a secret with the foe, lowering Sp. Atk.

Diamond Storm.description: Whips up a storm of diamonds. May up Defense.

Steam Eruption.description: Immerses the foe in heated steam. May inflict a burn.

Mystical Fire.description: Breathes a special, hot fire. Lowers Sp. Atk.

Spiky Shield.description: Evades attack, and damages the foe if struck.

Aromatic Mist.description: Raises the Sp. Def of a partner PokÃ©mon.

Eerie Impulse.description: Exposes the foe to a pulse that sharply cuts Sp. Atk.

Powder.description: Damages the foe if it uses a Fire-type move.

Nuzzle.description: Rubs its cheecks against the foe, paralyzing it.

Darkest Lariat.description: Swings the arms to strike It ignores stat changes.

Sparkling Aria.description: Sings with bubbles. Cures burns on contact.

Ice Hammer.description: Swings the fist to strike. Lowers the user's Speed.

Strength Sap.description: Saps the foe's Attack to heal HP, then drops Attack.

Solar Blade.description: Charges first turn, then chops with a blade of light.

Gear Up.description: Boosts the attacks of those with Plus or Minus.

Throat Chop.description: Chops the throat to disable sound moves for a while.

Lunge.description: Lunges at the foe to lower its Attack stat.

additionalEffects.effect: Set Up a Layer of Spikes

Bleakwind Storm.description: Hits with brutal, cold winds. May lower the foe's Speed.

Axe Kick.description: May miss and hurt the kicker. May cause confusion.

Bitter Blade.description: An attack that absorbs half the damage inflicted.

additionalEffects.effect: Drops Speed Each Turn for 3 Turns
